description: RBlock template management. Templates define the polyhedral geometry of rigid blocks. Each RBlock references a template that specifies its shape.

functions.name: count
functions.description: Get the number of rblock templates.

functions.name: find
functions.description: Find a rblock template by name. Note: lookup is by name string, not by integer ID.

parameters.name: template_name
parameters.description: Name of the template to find. Default template name is 'rblock' (with integers appended if duplicates exist).

returns.description: Template object if found, None if no template with that name exists

functions.name: findpebble
functions.description: Find the rblock template pebble with the given ID.

parameters.name: pebble_id
parameters.description: ID of the template pebble to find

functions.name: list
functions.description: Get a rblock template iterator object.

functions.name: maxid
functions.description: Get the maximum rblock templates ID.
